rdf:Description.dc:title: Maṣḥafa zenāhomu la-ʾabaw
መጽሐፈ፡ ዜናሆሙ፡ ለአበው፡
Maṣḥafa zenāhomu la-ʾabaw
Book of the History of the Fathers
Patericon Aethiopice
